expired.notification: Your listing "{{title}}" has expired. You can renew it to make it active again.
expired.subject: Your listing has expired
expired.heading: Your listing has expired
expired.subheading: Renew your listing to keep it active.
expired.body_renew: You can renew it to make it visible to the community again.

expiry_reminder.notification: Your listing "{{title}}" expires in {{days_text}} (on {{expiry_date}}) — renew it to keep it active.
expiry_reminder.subject: Your listing expires in {{days_text}}
expiry_reminder.heading: Your listing expires in {{days_text}}
expiry_reminder.subheading: Don't miss out — renew your listing to keep it active.
expiry_reminder.body_renew: Renew it now to keep it visible to the community.
expiry_reminder.urgent_note: Act soon to keep your listing visible!
expiry_reminder.expired_preview: Your listing has expired — renew it to stay visible
expiry_reminder.expired_body: Your listing "{{title}}" has expired. Renew it now to continue receiving responses from community members.

approved.notification: Your listing "{{title}}" has been approved and is now active.

rejected.notification: Your listing "{{title}}" was not approved. Reason: {{reason}}
rejected.subject: Your listing needs changes
rejected.heading: Your listing needs changes
rejected.subheading: Your listing was not approved — here's what to do next.
rejected.body_resubmit: Please review and update your listing, then resubmit for approval.

removed.notification: Your listing "{{title}}" has been removed by a moderator.
removed.email_body: Your listing "{{title}}" has been removed by a moderator.
